templates.title: Acknowledge Receipt
templates.bodyContent:
Hello,

I received your email. I will review it and reply by {TargetDate}.

Thank you.

templates.title: Request Additional Info
templates.bodyContent:
Hello,

To proceed, I need the following information:
- {MissingInfo}

Thank you.

templates.title: Propose Meeting Time
Delay Notice
templates.bodyContent:
Hello,

The review is delayed due to {Blocker}. I will share an update by {NewDate}.

Thank you for your understanding.

templates.title: Task Completed
templates.bodyContent:
Hello,

The requested task ({TaskName}) has been completed. Please review the result.

Thank you.

templates.title: On Hold
templates.bodyContent:
Hello,

This request is on hold until confirmation from {Dept}. I will update you as soon as it's resolved.

Thank you.

templates.title: Approve Request
templates.bodyContent:
Hello,

I approve the requested item: {ItemName}. Please proceed as planned.

Thank you.

templates.title: Simple Thanks
templates.bodyContent:
Hello,

Thank you for sharing this. I have noted it.

Thanks.
